name: wangyan--gemini-image-generator
description: Generate, edit, and compose images using Gemini models. Activate when user asks to generate images, draw, create logos/posters/icons/banners, edit/modify photos, combine images, or any image creation task. 画图、生成图片、做图、P图、修图、合成图、做logo、做海报、做图标、做封面、品牌视觉、Nano Banana、Banana。
